description: Original use: Official letter or decree in Arabic script. Written in large letters wide space between the lines. The ends of 8 lines are preserved. Elevated register, possibly referring to people who heretically left the path of [...] and praising al-shaykh Sabra(?) and referring to obeying an order (متابعتها والعمل بمرسومها).
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
